rationale: The response contains no Lean code at all, only an informal natural-language description of Bell-LaPadula, so it fails the rubric's most basic requirement.
rubric_evidence: Let L be a security lattice with partial order ≤
the simple-security condition (no-read-up) requires that a read by subject s of object o is permitted only if cls(o) ≤ clr(s)
